title: Spicy Chewy Japanese Noodles Ramen
description: A crowd‑pleasing ramen with hearty chewy noodles, a fiery pico de gallo sauce, and a savory miso broth, all dairy‑free and packed with fresh veggies.
instructions: 1. In a medium pot, bring the vegetable broth to a simmer and stir in miso paste until fully dissolved.
2. Add the sliced shiitake mushrooms and cook for 3 minutes, then stir in bok choy and cook for an additional 2 minutes until slightly softened.
3. While the broth is simmering, heat a small pan with sesame oil, garlic, and ginger; sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
4. Add the sautéed aromatics to the broth and bring back to a gentle simmer.
5. In a separate pot, cook the ramen noodles according to package instructions, then drain and set aside.
6. Transfer the cooked noodles to bowls, pour the hot broth over them, and top with sliced green onions and toasted sesame seeds.
7. Spoon generous amounts of pico de gallo over the noodles, then drizzle with sriracha or chili garlic sauce for extra heat.
8. Serve immediately, allowing guests to mix the pico de gallo into the broth for each bite.
